children.text: Across regulated environments, the challenge is not technology. It is aligning governance, systems, and operations so data can be used effectively in practice.

cards.title: Fragmented Governance
cards.body: Policies, controls, and delivery models are often disconnected across teams and institutions.

cards.title: Legacy Systems
cards.body: Existing infrastructure limits adaptability, interoperability, and secure data use.

cards.title: Operational Complexity
cards.body: Coordinating governance, technology, risk, and operations creates significant delivery friction.

cards.title: Trust and Usability
cards.body: Systems may meet compliance requirements but fail to support practical, day-to-day use.
